description: Full-featured colour-grading node for still images and video frame batches. Processing pipeline: (1) temperature shift — warms or cools the image; (2) multiplicative brightness; (3) contrast pivoted at mid-grey; (4) power-curve gamma; (5) hue rotation via HSV; (6) saturation scaling via HSV. All operations are pure-NumPy and require no additional dependencies. Set any parameter to its neutral value to disable that stage.
